title: Music Therapists
description: Plan, organize, direct, or assess clinical and evidenced-based music therapy interventions to positively influence individuals' physical, psychological, cognitive, or behavioral status.

tasks.text: Design or provide music therapy experiences to address client needs, such as using music for self-care, adjusting to life changes, improving cognitive functioning, raising self-esteem, communicating, or controlling impulses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design music therapy experiences, using various musical elements to meet client's goals or objectives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Sing or play musical instruments, such as keyboard, guitar, or percussion instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate with clients to build rapport, acknowledge their progress, or reflect upon their reactions to musical experiences.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Customize treatment programs for specific areas of music therapy, such as intellectual or developmental disabilities, educational settings, geriatrics, medical settings, mental health, physical disabilities, or wellness.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish client goals or objectives for music therapy treatment, considering client needs, capabilities, interests, overall therapeutic program, coordination of treatment, or length of treatment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Document evaluations, treatment plans, case summaries, or progress or other reports related to individual clients or client groups.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess client functioning levels, strengths, and areas of need in terms of perceptual, sensory, affective, communicative, musical, physical, cognitive, social, spiritual, or other abilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Observe and document client reactions, progress, or other outcomes related to music therapy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Improvise instrumentally, vocally, or physically to meet client's therapeutic needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Gather diagnostic data from sources such as case documentation, observations of clients, or interviews with clients or family members.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan or structure music therapy sessions to achieve appropriate transitions, pacing, sequencing, energy level, or intensity in accordance with treatment plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Engage clients in music experiences to identify client responses to different styles of music, types of musical experiences, such as improvising or listening, or elements of music, such as tempo or harmony.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Participate in continuing education.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate client assessment findings and recommendations in oral, written, audio, video, or other forms.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Integrate behavioral, developmental, improvisational, medical, or neurological approaches into music therapy treatments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with professionals on client's treatment team to develop, coordinate, or integrate treatment plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select or adapt musical instruments, musical equipment, or non-musical materials, such as adaptive devices or visual aids, to meet treatment objectives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Compose, arrange, or adapt music for music therapy treatments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify and respond to emergency physical or mental health situations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze or synthesize client data to draw conclusions or make recommendations for therapy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with others to design or implement interdisciplinary treatment programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct information sharing sessions, such as in-service workshops for other professionals, potential client groups, or the general community.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply selected research findings to practice.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze data to determine the effectiveness of specific treatments or therapy approaches.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Supervise staff, volunteers, practicum students, or interns engaged in music therapy activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess the risks and benefits of treatment termination for clients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adapt existing or develop new music therapy assessment instruments or procedures to meet an individual client's needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply current technology to music therapy practices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct, or assist in the conduct of, music therapy research.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
